task: Complete Stage 3 of checkpoint/goal lifecycle (auto-suggested goals expiry) and evaluate handover.md vs handover.json migration
discussion_summary: Stage 3 implementation added expiry logic for auto-suggested goals: tagging them at session_start, expiring them at checkpoint end after completed goals are processed. All three stages (stop hook, stale checkpoint gate, auto-suggested goal expiry) are now complete and committed. User asked whether handover.md can be removed in favor of handover.json — investigation started but incomplete; need to audit reader/writer to confirm no fallback logic or dual-file dependencies exist before recommending deletion.

accomplishments.what: Implemented expire_auto_suggested_goals() function in goals.py with 24-hour expiry window
Tagged auto-suggested goals at session_start with 'auto_suggested' marker and timestamp
Integrated expiry call into checkpoint.py after completed goals processing
Verified all Stage 3 changes compile cleanly in venv (Python 3.10+)
Committed and pushed Stage 1, 2, 3 to main branch

in_progress.what: Audit reader/writer to determine if handover.md can be safely deleted or if fallback/dual-file logic exists

next_actions.action: Complete grep audit: search codebase for all references to 'handover.md', 'handover_path', 'write_handover', and fallback logic in reader/writer modules
next_actions.why: User asked if handover.md can be deleted; need definitive answer on whether any code still reads/writes it or falls back to it

next_actions.action: If no dual-file logic found, commit rm -rf handover.md and update any documentation that references it
next_actions.why: Consolidate to single handover.json format; reduce confusion and maintenance burden

next_actions.action: Verify context checkpoint cards display correct 'turns remaining' in staging (open goal from previous session)
next_actions.why: This goal is still open and was not addressed this session

next_actions.action: Run full integration test: session_start → checkpoint → session_end with auto-suggested goals to confirm expiry fires correctly
next_actions.why: Stage 3 is complete but untested end-to-end; need confidence before stress-test phase

decisions.decision: Expiry window set to 24 hours for auto-suggested goals
decisions.reason: Aligns with session-end lifecycle; goals suggested at start of one session should not persist into next day

decisions.decision: Expiry logic runs at checkpoint end, after completed goals are processed
decisions.reason: Ensures completed goals are recorded before stale auto-suggested goals are removed; maintains audit trail

failed_approaches.approach: Testing changes with system Python (3.9) via direct python3 -c invocation
failed_approaches.reason: Union type syntax (|) requires Python 3.10+; venv has correct version but direct invocation does not. Switched to venv/bin/python for verification.

relational_files.why: Calls add_goal() and tags auto-suggested goals with metadata
Calls expire_auto_suggested_goals() at checkpoint end to clean stale goals
Stage 1 of lifecycle; ensures authoritative stop checkpoint runs first

blockers: Incomplete audit of handover.md vs handover.json reader/writer logic — cannot safely recommend deletion until confirmed no fallback or dual-file dependencies exist
